ai.page.caption: AI workspace
ai.page.title: AI module shell is connected
ai.page.description: This round only wires up the dedicated AI workspace, navigation entry, and page shell. Later rounds will add the media list, mode state, output settings, and offline execution flow.
ai.page.materials.title: Media list
ai.page.materials.description: Later rounds will connect the video material list here. The launch scope is frozen to video-only import with supported formats: {formats}; multiple videos can be imported, but only one current video can be processed at a time.
ai.page.workspace.title: AI workspace
ai.page.workspace.description: This round only delivers the shell for AI interpolation and AI enhancement. It does not implement runtime integration, parameter panels, or inference execution yet.
ai.page.output.title: Output settings
ai.page.output.description: This area is reserved for AI output settings. The launch scope is frozen to MP4 and MKV with the original audio track preserved by default; concrete output state and constraints will be added in the next round.
ai.interpolation.cardDescription: The launch route is frozen to RIFE. Later rounds will add media input, multiplier parameters, execution coordination, and cancellation control.
ai.enhancement.cardDescription: The launch route is frozen to Real-ESRGAN with a multiplier range of 2x to 16x. Parameters and the workflow will be added incrementally in later rounds.
